title: Security Incident Response and Reporting
checks: Verify ICT Operations as First Responder (24/7 availability)
Confirm Cyber Security Specialists available in Security Team
Validate Management contacts: Head ICT, Legal, Compliance
Check External contacts: Regulators, Law Enforcement, Vendors
Confirm Executive notification path to Board-level if required
recommended_actions: Incident classification Category 1 Critical: Data breach confirmed, system compromise, ransomware infection, major denial of service
Category 1 response: Immediate, 24/7, executive notification
Incident classification Category 2 Major: Suspected breach, multiple failed access attempts, malware detection, system vulnerability exploitation
Category 2 response: Immediate, security team engagement
Incident classification Category 3 Minor: Single failed access attempt, suspicious activity, policy violation, security alert
Category 3 response: Investigate, document, remediate
Phase 1 Detection/Initial Response: Incident detection automated or manual
Phase 1: Immediate isolation if necessary
Phase 1: Initial assessment and classification
Phase 1: First responder actions to contain
Phase 2 Investigation/Analysis: Security team engagement
Phase 2: Evidence collection and preservation
Phase 2: Root cause analysis
Phase 2: Impact assessment
Phase 2: Containment strategy development
Phase 3 Containment/Eradication: Execute containment measures
Phase 3: Remove threat from environment
Phase 3: Verify threat elimination
Phase 3: Secure affected systems
Phase 4 Recovery/Restoration: Restore systems from clean backups
Phase 4: Verify system integrity
Phase 4: Implement additional security measures
Phase 4: Monitor for reinfection
Phase 5 Post Incident: Lessons learned analysis
Phase 5: Process improvement implementation
Phase 5: Documentation completion
Phase 5: Training and awareness updates
Internal notification Immediate: Security team, Head ICT
Internal notification within 1 hour: Legal, Compliance, Risk Management
Internal notification within 4 hours: Executive Management
Internal notification within 24 hours: Board notification if required
External notification to Regulators: As per regulatory requirements
External notification to Law Enforcement: If criminal activity suspected
External notification to Customers: If customer data breached
External notification to Vendors: If vendor systems involved
External notification to Public: If public disclosure required
Evidence preservation: System logs preservation
Evidence preservation: Network traffic capture
Evidence preservation: Malware samples preservation
Evidence preservation: Access logs retention
Evidence preservation: Chain of custody documentation
RBZ regulatory reporting: Immediate notification of major incidents
RBZ regulatory reporting: Detailed report within specified timeframe
RBZ regulatory reporting: Remediation plan submission
RBZ regulatory reporting: Regular updates until resolution
Other regulatory reporting: PCI-DSS requirements for card data
Other regulatory reporting: Data protection regulations
Other regulatory reporting: Financial sector regulations
Other regulatory reporting: Cybersecurity regulations
Business impact assessment: Financial impact estimation
Business impact assessment: Customer impact assessment
Business impact assessment: Reputation damage assessment
Business impact assessment: Regulatory compliance impact
Business impact assessment: Operational disruption assessment
Recovery prioritization: Critical banking systems first
Recovery prioritization: Customer facing channels
Recovery prioritization: Payment and settlement systems
Recovery prioritization: Internal systems
Recovery prioritization: Reporting and management systems
Training and preparedness: Regular incident response drills
Training and preparedness: Security awareness training
Training and preparedness: Tabletop exercises
Training and preparedness: Tool and process training
Training and preparedness: Role-specific training
Continuous improvement: Post incident reviews
Continuous improvement: Process gap analysis
Continuous improvement: Tool and technology evaluation
Continuous improvement: Policy and procedure updates
Continuous improvement: Training program updates
notes: Regular testing of incident response plans
Internal communication: Regular updates to stakeholders
External communication: Legal review before release
Incident report requirements: Incident detection details
Incident report requirements: Timeline of events
Incident report requirements: Root cause analysis
Legal and compliance documentation: Regulatory notification records
Legal and compliance documentation: Legal advice documentation
Legal and compliance documentation: Customer notification records
Legal and compliance documentation: Public communication records
